headline: Omada Health, Inc. (OMDA) Stock Jumps 10.5%: Will It Continue to Soar?
summary: Omada Health, Inc. (OMDA) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
